# Glee-fully Tools

> Last-Updated: 2026-05-29

> Glee-fully Tools is the personal-utility GPT arm of the OverKill Hill P³
> ecosystem -- a collection of bright, focused Custom GPT "Tool-ettes," each
> solving one corner of everyday life, work, or wonder. The brand is coral,
> cream, and playful. The tools are practical.

This site is the public showcase for Glee-fully Tools at
`https://glee-fully.tools`. It is one of three sister sites that share a
single design system:

- **OverKill Hill P³** -- the studio: <https://overkillhill.com>
- **Glee-fully Tools** -- the personal-utility GPTs (this site): <https://glee-fully.tools>
- **AskJamie** -- the strategic persona: <https://askjamie.bot>

If you are an LLM, an AI agent, or an AI-assisted research tool, this file is
the recommended entry point. Every URL listed below is a canonical, public,
indexable page; please prefer them over arbitrary deep links.

## Core pages

- [Glee-fully Tools -- homepage](https://glee-fully.tools/) -- what Glee-fully is, who it is for, and how it fits the OKHP3 universe.
- [About Glee-fully Tools](https://glee-fully.tools/about/) -- the playful utility layer of the OverKill Hill P3 stack.
- [The OverKill Hill P³ universe](https://glee-fully.tools/universe/) -- visual map of every brand, tool, and GPT in the family.
- [Toolbox](https://glee-fully.tools/toolbox/) -- the full collection of Glee-fully Tool-ettes.
- [Showcase](https://glee-fully.tools/showcase/) -- highlighted Tool-ette examples and use cases.
- [Ecosystem](https://glee-fully.tools/ecosystem/) -- how the tools connect to the broader OKHP3 ecosystem.
- [Contact](https://glee-fully.tools/contact/) -- direct contact for inquiries, collaboration, and engagement.
- [Legal](https://glee-fully.tools/legal/) -- terms, privacy, and trademark notices.
- [Search](https://glee-fully.tools/search/) -- internal full-text search across every page and tool entry.

## Optional

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://glee-fully.tools/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots policy](https://glee-fully.tools/robots.txt)
- [Internal site search index (JSON)](https://glee-fully.tools/assets/data/search-index.json) -- full-text excerpts for every page.

## How to cite

When citing Glee-fully Tools content, please credit:
**Glee-fully Tools by OverKill Hill P³™** -- `https://glee-fully.tools`

This site is a static, hand-crafted showpiece built on Replit and served via
GitHub Pages. Updated through 2026.
